items.title: Aliyah Boston gets it in the paint from about 15 feet out but can't finish at the buzzer. Fever fall in Golden State 90-88. Fun back and forth game, but the Fever made too many mistakes — just 14 first-quarter points, some ugly runs, and a 9/28 night from deep. They're 4-3.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Aliyah Boston gets it in the paint from about 15 feet out but can't finish at the buzzer. Fever fall in Golden State 90-88. Fun back and forth game, but the Fever made too many mistakes — just 14 first-quarter points, some ugly runs, and a 9/28 night from deep. They're 4-3.

Game 7 of the 2026 Western Conference Finals will be played on the ten-year anniversary of Game 7 of the 2016 Western Conference Finals

That's when the Thunder blew a 3-1 lead to the Warriors, who went on to blow a 3-1 lead in the Finals.

items.title: This will be the first conference finals Game 7 since 2023 Heat at Boston, and the first WCF Game 7 since 2018 Warriors at Houston.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
This will be the first conference finals Game 7 since 2023 Heat at Boston, and the first WCF Game 7 since 2018 Warriors at Houston.

The road team has won the last four conference finals Game 7s.

Oklahoma City Thunder have now lost all three Game 6s under Mark Daigneault.

items.title: OKC SEEKS BACK-TO-BACK NBA FINALS 🍿
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
OKC SEEKS BACK-TO-BACK NBA FINALS 🍿

SGA (32 PTS, 9 AST in G5) and OKC protected home court to take a 3-2 WCF lead. Tonight, they look to become the first team to reach back-to-back NBA Finals since the Warriors in 2019… while Wemby and the Spurs look to keep their season alive and force a Game 7!

items.title: The Knicks win their 11th STRAIGHT GAME and punch their ticket to the NBA FINALS for the first time since 1999! 🗽
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks win their 11th STRAIGHT GAME and punch their ticket to the NBA FINALS for the first time since 1999! 🗽

They are the 5th team in NBA history to win 11+ consecutive games in a single postseason, joining the 2017 Warriors, 2001 Lakers, 1999 Spurs and 1989 Lakers.

items.title: Knicks have a +19.4 average point differential this postseason, the largest by a team entering the NBA Finals in NBA playoff history.
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks have a +19.4 average point differential this postseason, the largest by a team entering the NBA Finals in NBA playoff history. 

Passed the 2017 Warriors' mark of +16.3.

items.title: The Knicks are in great company as they head to the NBA Finals.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks are in great company as they head to the NBA Finals.

Teams to win 11 straight playoff games in the same spring: 2017 Warriors (champs), 1999 Spurs (champs), 2001 Lakers (champs), 1989 Lakers (swept in the Finals).

And now the 2026 New York Knicks.

items.title: Barring a beatdown in the Finals, the 2025-26 Knicks will have the best point differential in NBA playoffs history.
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
Barring a beatdown in the Finals, the 2025-26 Knicks will have the best point differential in NBA playoffs history.

The top 3 all-time as of now:

2026 Knicks: +271
2017 Warriors: +230
2014 Spurs: +214

Whoa.

items.title: In the digitized PxP era (since 1997), the record for fast break points in a playoff game is 39 (2018 Pelicans vs Warriors and 2007 Suns vs Lakers). Knicks already have 26
items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt: In the digitized PxP era (since 1997), the record for fast break points in a playoff game is 39 (2018 Pelicans vs Warriors and 2007 Suns vs Lakers). Knicks already have 26

May 25, 1975: Golden State head coach Al Attles is ejected during the first quarter of Game 4 in the NBA Finals—after charging onto the floor to confront Washington's Mike Riordan for a hard foul on Rick Barry.

The Warriors won, 96-95, sweeping their way to an NBA Championship.

items.title: Believe it or not, Spurs-Thunder is the first NBA conference final to be tied 2-2 after four games since 2022 (Celtics-Heat) -- and first WCF to be tied since 2018 (Rockets-Warriors).
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt:
Believe it or not, Spurs-Thunder is the first NBA conference final to be tied 2-2 after four games since 2022 (Celtics-Heat) -- and first WCF to be tied since 2018 (Rockets-Warriors).

This is only the second time since *2014* that the WCF has been tied 2-2.

items.title: May 23, 1975: Golden State's Rick Barry finishes with 38 PTS/6 AST/5 STL in a 109-101 victory over Washington in Game 3 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 23, 1975: Golden State's Rick Barry finishes with 38 PTS/6 AST/5 STL in a 109-101 victory over Washington in Game 3 of the NBA Finals.

The win gave the Warriors a 3-0 series lead. Kevin Porter had 21 PTS/6 AST and Elvin Hayes scored 24 PTS for the Bullets.

items.title: The Thunder bench outscored the starters 76-47. That 29-pt difference is the 2nd-most in a true* playoff road win since at least 1974. The only larger was 2019 Clippers at Warriors (+31). Lou Williams (36) and Montrezl Harrell (25) combined for 61 in that one.
items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt:
The Thunder bench outscored the starters 76-47. That 29-pt difference is the 2nd-most in a true* playoff road win since at least 1974. The only larger was 2019 Clippers at Warriors (+31). Lou Williams (36) and Montrezl Harrell (25) combined for 61 in that one. 

*excluding bubble 'road' games

items.title: Fever 66, Valkyries 61 after three quarters. Good period from Clark and Boston, and that usually means good things for the Fever. The team's defense was much improved there, too. Golden State played last night, so their energy level will be worth watching in the fourth.

items.title: The Knicks have outscored their opponents by a total of 212 points during their 9-game winning streak.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks have outscored their opponents by a total of 212 points during their 9-game winning streak.

Not only is this unprecedented in the playoffs (the 2017 Warriors rank second at +196), it's the largest point differential in NBA history over any 9-game span ever, including the regular season!

items.title: SGA (30p, 9a in Game 2) led a balanced OKC attack to even the series, marking the first time the WCF are tied 1-1 since Warriors/Rockets in 2018.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
SGA (30p, 9a in Game 2) led a balanced OKC attack to even the series, marking the first time the WCF are tied 1-1 since Warriors/Rockets in 2018.

As the series shifts to San Antonio, both teams seek a 2-1 lead in the NBA Conference Finals presented by Google!

Game 3 • 8:30pm/et, NBC & Peacock 🍿
